mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE (ATTENDANCE_SEQ, USERS_ID, WORK_DATE, CHECK_IN) VALUES (ATTENDANCE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{users_id}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET CHECK_OUT = SYSTIMESTAMP, TOTAL_WORK_MIN = ROUND( (CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(CHECK_IN AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 ) WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND WORK_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

UPDATE ATTENDANCE A SET
CHECK_IN = CASE WHEN A.CHECK_IN IS NOT NULL THEN A.CHECK_IN -- 기존 기록 있으면 유지 ELSE CASE
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VACATION V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '오전반차' AND D.STATUS = 'APPROVED' ) THEN TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 13/24
ELSE TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 9/24 END END,
CHECK_OUT = CASE WHEN A.CHECK_OUT IS NOT NULL THEN A.CHECK_OUT -- 기존 기록 있으면 유지 ELSE CASE
WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VACATION V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '오후반차' AND D.STATUS = 'APPROVED' ) THEN TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 13/24
ELSE TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 18/24 END END,
TOTAL_WORK_MIN = CASE WHEN A.TOTAL_WORK_MIN IS NOT NULL THEN A.TOTAL_WORK_MIN -- 이미 계산되어 있으면 유지 ELSE ROUND(( CASE WHEN A.CHECK_OUT IS NOT NULL THEN A.CHECK_OUT WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM VACATION V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '오후반차' AND D.STATUS = 'APPROVED') THEN TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 13/24 ELSE TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 18/24 END CASE WHEN A.CHECK_IN IS NOT NULL THEN A.CHECK_IN WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM VACATION V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '오전반차' AND D.STATUS = 'APPROVED') THEN TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 13/24 ELSE TRUNC(A.WORK_DATE) + 9/24 END ) * 24 * 60) END WHERE A.WORK_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND (A.CHECK_IN IS NULL OR A.CHECK_OUT IS NULL)
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VACATION V JOIN DOCUMENT D ON V.DOC_SEQ = D.DOC_SEQ WHERE D.USERS_ID = A.USERS_ID AND A.WORK_DATE BETWEEN V.START_DATE AND V.END_DATE AND V.VAC_TYPE = '연차' AND D.STATUS = 'APPROVED' )
mapper.select: SELECT CHECK_IN, CHECK_OUT FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{users_id} AND WORK_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS work_days, ROUND(SUM(TOTAL_WORK_MIN) / 60, 1) AS total_hours, SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI') > '09:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VACATION v JOIN DRAFT_DOCUMENTS dd ON v.DOC_SEQ = dd.DOC_SEQ WHERE dd.USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND dd.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND TO_CHAR(v.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') ) AS vac_cnt FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND TO_CHAR(WORK_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM') GROUP BY USERS_ID

SELECT -- 안쪽에서 이미 집계된 1행짜리 데이터이므로 그냥 꺼내오면 됩니다! NVL(A.work_days, 0) AS "work_days", NVL(A.late_cnt, 0) AS "late_cnt", NVL(A.overtime_hours, 0) AS "overtime_hours",
-- 이제 독립적인 서브쿼리가 같이 있어도 에러가 나지 않습니다. (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VACATION v JOIN DRAFT_DOCUMENTS dd ON v.DOC_SEQ = dd.DOC_SEQ WHERE dd.USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND dd.STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND v.START_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND v.START_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ) AS "vac_cnt" FROM ( -- [출퇴근 데이터 집계부] -- 여기서 무조건 1행의 결과만 반환하므로, 바깥에서 MAX()를 감쌀 필요가 없었던 것입니다. SELECT COUNT(*) AS work_days, SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI') > '09:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_cnt, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN TOTAL_WORK_MIN > 480 THEN TOTAL_WORK_MIN - 480 ELSE 0 END) / 60, 1) AS overtime_hours FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE USERS_ID = #{loginId} AND WORK_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND WORK_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ) A
